intentSynonyms: show me my ai models in cloudflare
view my ai models in cloudflare
see all my ai models in cloudflare
list workers ai models in cloudflare
description: Search and list Workers AI models available in the account. Returns model names, descriptions, task types, and properties. Supports filtering by name and task.

search.description: Search query to filter models by name

task.description: Filter by task type (e.g., "Text Generation", "Image Classification")
